meta.title: Vertex PMO — Strategic Project Management | Gatineau-Ottawa
meta.description: Project management firm specializing in PMO consulting, portfolio management and Agile transformation. On time. On budget.

hero.title: Your Projects, Delivered. On Time. On Budget.
hero.subtitle: Strategic PMO consulting, portfolio management and Agile transformation for ambitious organizations.

pain.title: Are Your Projects Going Off the Rails?

scope.title: Uncontrollable Scope
scope.description: Scope creep eats your budget and timelines. Every 'urgent' request becomes top priority and nothing gets finished.

budget.title: Cost Overruns
budget.description: Projects always end up more expensive than planned. Without rigorous tracking, budget surprises become the norm.

team.title: Overloaded Teams
team.description: Too many projects, not enough people. Your key resources are stretched thin across priorities and burning out.

methodology.title: Our 6-Phase Method
methodology.subtitle: A proven process that transforms chaos into predictable deliveries.

discovery.title: Discovery
discovery.description: Analysis of your current project maturity, identification of key issues and quick wins.

planning.title: Strategic Planning
planning.description: Detailed project plan development: WBS, schedule, budget, RACI matrix and risk register.

execution.title: Guided Execution
execution.description: Implementation with tight governance: stand-ups, real-time dashboards and proactive management.

monitoring.title: Monitoring & Control
monitoring.description: Real-time KPIs, Earned Value Management (EVM), progress reports and change management.

delivery.title: Delivery
delivery.description: Structured handoff, complete documentation, lessons learned and acceptance criteria validation.

support.title: Post-Project Support
support.description: Transition support, continuous optimization and team coaching.

c1.before: 67% of projects late. No portfolio visibility. Budgets exceeded by 40% on average.
c1.after: 93% of projects delivered on time. Real-time portfolio dashboard. Overruns reduced to 8%.

c2.before: Inconsistent methodology across teams. Manual Excel reports taking 2 days per month.
c2.after: Standardized PMO framework. Automated reports in 2 hours. 100% Agile adoption.

c3.before: 3 major projects simultaneously over budget. Constant resource conflicts. No risk register.
c3.after: Optimized and prioritized portfolio. Rationalized resource allocation. 12 major risks proactively mitigated.

cta_final.title: Ready to Take Back Control?
cta_final.subtitle: No jargon. No endless slides. Just a frank discussion about your project challenges.

assessment.title: Assess Your Project Maturity
assessment.subtitle: 12 questions to measure your project management practices across 6 key axes.

q1.question: How do you define the scope of your projects?
q1.a5: Formal process with validation and baseline

q2.question: How do you manage scope changes?
q2.a5: Formal process with integrated impact analysis

q3.question: How do you plan schedules?
q3.a5: Critical path, buffers and Monte Carlo simulation

q5.question: How do you estimate project costs?

q6.question: How do you control the budget during the project?
q6.a5: EVM with CPI/SPI and estimate at completion

q7.question: How do you ensure deliverable quality?
q7.a1: The client tells us if it's ok
q7.a5: Integrated quality assurance program with metrics

q8.question: How do you handle lessons learned?

q9.question: How do you identify risks?
q9.a1: We discover them when they happen

q10.question: How do you respond to risks?

q11.question: How do you manage stakeholders?
q11.a1: We talk to the client when they call

q12.question: How do you report to stakeholders?

low.title: Initial Level — Urgent Action Needed
low.description: Your project management practices are minimal. Projects depend on individuals rather than processes. A PMO diagnostic could transform your results quickly.

mid.title: Structured Level — Consolidation Required
mid.description: You have foundations, but they lack consistency. Standardizing processes and equipping your project managers would yield significant gains.

high.title: Optimized Level — Fine-tuning
high.description: Congratulations! Your practices are mature. Continuous optimization, automation and advanced coaching could bring you to excellence.

meta.title: Services — PMO Consulting, Portfolio & Agile
meta.description: Strategic PMO consulting, project portfolio management and Agile transformation coaching for organizations of all sizes.

hero.title: Services
hero.subtitle: Three tracks to structure, optimize and transform your project management.

consulting.title: Strategic PMO Consulting
consulting.description: Setting up a project management office (PMO) tailored to your reality.
consulting.item2: PMO model design (supportive, controlling or directive)
consulting.result: An operational PMO delivering value from month one.

portfolio.title: Project Portfolio Management
portfolio.description: See clearly across your projects. Prioritize what matters. Allocate intelligently.
portfolio.item1: Inventory and categorization of all active projects

agile.title: Agile Transformation
agile.description: Move from waterfall to Agile — without chaos or resistance.
agile.item3: Hands-on team and Product Owner training
agile.result: Autonomous teams delivering in short, predictable cycles.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: How much does PMO consulting cost?
faq.a1: An initial diagnostic ranges from $5,000 to $10,000. Full PMO implementation from $25,000 to $75,000 depending on scope. We set a fixed budget after discovery — no surprises.
faq.q2: We're a 50-person SMB, is this for us?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Our methods scale. A lightweight PMO for a 50-person SMB is nothing like one for a multinational. We calibrate to your reality.
faq.q3: How long before we see results?
faq.a3: Quick wins come in 4-6 weeks. Structural results (reduced delays, better visibility) in 3-6 months. Cultural transformation takes 12-18 months.
faq.q4: Do you work with specific tools?
faq.a4: We adapt to your stack: MS Project, Jira, Monday.com, Azure DevOps, Smartsheet... The tool is a means, not an end. We choose what fits your context.
faq.q5: Can you manage our projects in an outsourcing model?
faq.a5: Yes. We offer senior project managers in outsourcing mode for mandates of 3 months and more. Perfect when you have a critical project but not the internal resource.
faq.a6: Absolutely. Our team is bilingual — documentation, reports and coaching available in French and English.

meta.title: About — Vertex PMO
meta.description: 15 years of project management expertise for public and private organizations. Discover our approach and team.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: 15 years delivering projects. Hundreds of mandates. One obsession: results.

story.title: Why Vertex PMO?
story.p1: After 15 years directing project offices in the public and private sectors, we've seen the same pattern everywhere: brilliant organizations losing control of their projects. Not from lack of talent — from lack of structure.
story.p2: We founded Vertex PMO to offer Gatineau-Ottawa organizations what large firms charge triple for — but with the agility and proximity of a local team.
story.p3: Our philosophy is simple: a good PMO doesn't create bureaucracy, it eliminates it. Every process we implement must accelerate your deliveries, not slow them down.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.p1: We measure our success by yours. If your projects are delivered on time, on budget and according to expectations — mission accomplished. If your teams are also autonomous and motivated — that's the cherry on top.

precision.title: Rigor
precision.description: Every decision is data-driven. Every risk is quantified. Every schedule is realistic.
precision.example: When a client says 'we want this yesterday,' we don't say yes. We show the options with their real impacts.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: We work WITH your teams, not alongside them. Knowledge transfer is built into every mandate.
collaboration.example: Our project managers coach yours in parallel. When we leave, your team is stronger than before.

results.title: Results
results.description: No 200-page PowerPoint decks. Concrete deliverables, measurable improvements, projects that actually finish.
results.example: Our main KPI: the percentage of projects delivered on time and on budget after our intervention.
